---
title: "简历"
toc: false
---

## 教育经历

<div class="education-panel">
<div class="education-row">
<div class="education-main">
<span class="education-degree">博士研究生</span>
<span class="education-school">中国人民大学经济学院</span>
</div>
<div class="education-meta">
<span class="education-major">西方经济学</span>
<span class="education-date">2022年9月－至今</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="education-row">
<div class="education-main">
<span class="education-degree">硕士研究生</span>
<span class="education-school">中国人民大学经济学院</span>
</div>
<div class="education-meta">
<span class="education-major">西方经济学</span>
<span class="education-date">2019年9月－2021年6月</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="education-row">
<div class="education-main">
<span class="education-degree">本科</span>
<span class="education-school">中国人民大学经济学院</span>
</div>
<div class="education-meta">
<span class="education-major">经济学</span>
<span class="education-date">2015年9月－2019年6月</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## 完整简历

<div class="cv-card compact">
  <div class="cv-text">下载 PDF 版本，查看完整的教育背景、所获荣誉、科研成果与综合技能。</div>
  <a class="cv-button" href="ZhangZiyang_CV.pdf" target="_blank">下载 CV</a>
</div>
